measurement_note: Size is the input string length. Each tier forces all copies of two equally frequent letters through the cooldown path; an implementation that repeatedly searches or deletes from the remaining string performs quadratic work while the heap-and-cooldown reference remains linear.

cases.name: benchmark: balanced two-letter schedule at n = 512
benchmark: balanced two-letter schedule at n = 4096
benchmark: balanced two-letter schedule at n = 32768
